summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control dashboard. All major functionality working correctly including model selector, plus menu with submenus, chat functionality, and binary rain background effect.
passed_tests: Left sidebar renders with Personal dropdown, navigation items, Bookmarks, History, user avatar
Navigation items show correct active state (Chat is active by default)
Approvals badge shows '2'
Top header shows Chat/Cowork/Code tabs
Connection status indicator shows 'Scheduled' with green dot
OpenClaw logo with lobster emoji and Mission Control subtitle displays
Model selector dropdown opens and shows providers list (anthropic, deepseek, google, nvidia, openai, etc.)
Selecting a provider shows models in right panel with context (128K/262K), cost (Free), and capability icons
Plus menu opens with all options (Add files, Add to project, Add from GitHub, Skills, Connectors, Plugins, Research, Web search, Use style)
Skills submenu shows 8 skills (deep-research, code-review, web-scraper, file-manager, task-scheduler, mcp-builder, slack-gif-creator, canvas-design)
Connectors submenu shows toggle switches that work (Control your Mac, Desktop Commander, File Access, Web Search, Signal, Telegram)
Use style submenu shows 4 styles (Normal, Concise, Formal, Explanatory)
Web search toggle checkbox works
Chat input accepts text
Agent mode toggle button is visible
Feature cards are clickable (Select a model, Try Agent, Deep Research, Mission Control)
Binary rain background effect renders correctly
Chat functionality works with streaming responses
Model selection and switching works correctly
All toggle switches in connectors submenu functional
Skills can be toggled on/off successfully
Writing style selection works
Zustand state management working properly
